zh.Renty, Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪
zh.Seninghem, Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Ha: 法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯澤寧姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jacques I de Renty於1250年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪時，他的父親Arnould III de RENTY25歲，母親Marguerite BOUDET de GROVILLE24歲。他於1271年與Jeanne de Seninghem在法國豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯澤寧姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1305年在他的家鄉享年55歲。

zh-hans.Renty, Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-: 法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪
zh-hans.Seninghem, Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Ha: 法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯澤寧姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jacques I de Renty于1250年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯雷迪时，他的父亲Arnould III de RENTY25岁，母亲Marguerite BOUDET de GROVILLE24岁。他于1271年与Jeanne de Seninghem在法国豪-德-福朗斯帕-德-卡拉斯澤寧姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1305年在他的家乡享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Renty
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Angel, Alicia, Bolivar, Francisco, Jorge, Juan, Julio, Magda, Manuel, Nydia, Virgen.
Spanish and Portuguese: most probably from renta ‘income’, ‘rental’. This name is common mainly in the Caribbean; it is rare in Spain.

variants.name: Rentas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Jose, Pedro, Ramonita, Angel, Juan, Manuel, Mario, Tomas, Aida, Armando, Blanca.
Spanish and Portuguese: plural form of   Renta  .

nameMeanings.name: Jacques
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of James and Jacob . In French there is no distinction between a form corresponding to Jacob and a form corresponding to James. This is a perennially popular French given name, and Jacques or Jacques Bonhomme has been used (like John Bull in English) as a typification of the ordinary citizen. In Shakespeare's time it was also used as an English name, pronounced ‘jay-kwez’, as in the case of the melancholy character Jacques in As You Like It. Though rarely, if ever, now used in Britain it is found in the United States.

en.lifeSummary: When Jacques I de Renty was born in 1250, in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, his father, Arnould III de RENTY, was 25 and his mother, Marguerite BOUDET de GROVILLE, was 24. He married Jeanne de Seninghem in 1271, in Seninghem, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1305, in his hometown, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jacques I de Renty est né en 1250, à Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Arnould III de RENTY, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Marguerite BOUDET de GROVILLE, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne de Seninghem en 1271, à Seninghem, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1305, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jacques I de Renty 1250 in Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Arnould III de RENTY 25 und seine Mutter Marguerite BOUDET de GROVILLE 24. Er hat 1271 in Seninghem, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Jeanne de Seninghem geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1305 im Alter von 55 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jacques I de Renty è nato il nel 1250 nel Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, il suo padre, Arnould III de RENTY, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Marguerite BOUDET de GROVILLE, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne de Seninghem nel 1271, nel Seninghem, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1305, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.Renty, Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスレントイ
ja.Seninghem, Saint-Omer, Pas-de-Calais, Ha: フランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスセニングヘム
ja.lifeSummary: Jacques I de Rentyが1250年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスレントイで生まれた時，父Arnould III de RENTYは25歳，母Marguerite BOUDET de GROVILLEは24歳であった。1271年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスプアス-デ-カレイスセニングヘムでJeanne de Seninghemと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1305年に故郷で55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jacques I de Renty(이)가 1250년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 렌티에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Arnould III de RENTY(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Marguerite BOUDET de GROVILLE(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1271년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 파스-데-캘레이 센잉헤에서 Jeanne de Seninghem(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1305년 그의 고향에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jacques I de Renty nasceu em 1250, em Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Arnould III de RENTY, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite BOUDET de GROVILLE, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne de Seninghem em 1271, em Seninghem, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1305, em sua cidade natal, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jacques I de Renty родился в 1250 г. в местности ренти, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, его отцу по имени Arnould III de RENTY было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite BOUDET de GROVILLE, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne de Seninghem в 1271 г. в местности сенингхем, пас-де-калеи, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1305 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jacques I de Renty nació en 1250, en Renty, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Arnould III de RENTY, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Marguerite BOUDET de GROVILLE, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Jeanne de Seninghem en 1271, en Seninghem, Pas-de-Calais, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1305, en su pueblo, a la edad de 55 años.
